positive: A central, symmetrical geometric pattern featuring stylized celestial elements—luminous crescent moons, constellations, and abstract nebulae—intertwining with minimalist tropical flora motifs like monstera leaves and exotic ferns. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau curvature and modern cosmic psychedelia, rendered as a high-contrast, thick-line vector illustration. Use a restricted color palette of deep midnight blues, electric teal, burnished gold, and matte black. The composition must be highly centralized and balanced for repeat pattern application, ensuring clear silhouettes and bold outlines. Lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, making the gold elements glow against the dark background. Focus on clean vector aesthetics and graphic scalability.
negative: photorealism, blur, noise, messy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, grainy, low detail, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signatures, signature art, gradient noise
